top_findings.title: Can search and return match data from all provided CSV files
top_findings.evidence: src/brazilian_soccer/data.clj — loads all 6 CSVs (Brasileirao_Matches, Brazilian_Cup_Matches, Libertadores_Matches, BR-Football-Dataset, novo_campeonato_brasileiro, fifa_data). Demo output shows queries across all datasets working.

top_findings.title: Can search and return player data
top_findings.evidence: src/brazilian_soccer/queries.clj:search-players function, src/brazilian_soccer/mcp.clj:search_players tool. Demo Q13-Q17 show player searches by name, nationality, club, position, rating working correctly.

top_findings.title: Can calculate basic statistics (wins, losses, goals)
top_findings.evidence: src/brazilian_soccer/queries.clj:team-record, league-stats, biggest-wins functions. Demo Q05-Q06, Q11-Q12 show W/D/L records, goal difference, avg goals per match calculated correctly.

top_findings.title: Can compare teams head-to-head
top_findings.evidence: src/brazilian_soccer/queries.clj:head-to-head function. Demo Q07-Q08 show head-to-head records with win counts and goal tallies between teams.

top_findings.title: Handles team name variations correctly
top_findings.evidence: src/brazilian_soccer/normalize.clj — implements team-name canonicalisation collapsing accents, suffixes, aliases. README describes handling of 'Grêmio-RS' = 'Gremio', 'EC Bahia' = 'Bahia', distinguishing 'Atlético' vs 'Athletico'.
